title: Application - Uninstall mobile application
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app uninstallation verification from Android device home screen
steps: Ensure the Poly Studio Mobile app is installed and visible on the device's home screen or app drawer.
Long-press the Poly Studio Mobile app icon.
Confirm the uninstall action when prompted.
Verify the Poly Studio Mobile app icon is no longer visible on the home screen or in the app drawer.
expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app is successfully uninstalled and no longer appears on the home screen or in the app drawer.
